title: August 30
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|August}}

'''August 30''' is the 242nd day of the year (243rd in leap years), with 123 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1950s#1954|1954]] – [[David Paymer]] is born.
*[[1977]] – [[Nalini Krishan]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 30|''Star Wars Weekly'' 30]] published.
*[[1983]] – [[Star Wars Annual (1977) 3|''Star Wars Annual'' (1977) 3]] published.
*[[1992]] – [[Jessica Henwick]] is born.
*[[1994]] – [[Classic Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back 1|''Classic Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back'' 1]] published.
*[[2003]] – [[Reginald Thomason]] dies.
*[[2011]] – [[The Force Unleashed II (novel)|''The Force Unleashed II'']] paperback published.
*[[2015]] – ''[[Disney Infinity 3.0]]'' released.
*[[2016]] – ''[[LEGO Star Wars: Face Off]]'' published.
*2016 – '' [[Star Wars Rebels: Complete Season Two]]'' released.
*[[2017]] – [[Star Wars (2015) 35|''Star Wars'' (2015) 35]] published.
*2017 – [[Jedi of the Republic – Mace Windu 1|''Jedi of the Republic – Mace Windu'' 1]] published.
*2017 – [[Star Wars Rebels|''Star Wars Rebels'' Magazine 35]] published.
*[[2018]] – [[Marie Severin]] dies.
*[[2020]] – [[Celebration Anaheim (2022)|Celebration Anaheim 2020]] originally scheduled to end.
*[[2023]] – [[Bounty Hunters 37|''Bounty Hunters'' 37]] published.
*2023 – [[Hyperspace Stories 8|''Hyperspace Stories'' 8]] published.
*2023 – [[The Mandalorian Season 2 3|''The Mandalorian Season 2'' 3]] published.
*[[2024]] – ''[[Star Wars Outlaws]]'' released.
*2024 – "[[The Terror of Tenoo / The Prince of Masks]]" aired on [[Disney Junior]].
